headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall On U.S. Peace Plan To Iran; 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: Futures rose and oil prices fell as the U.S. reportedly sent a peace plan to Iran. President Trump said Tehran is "talking sense."

headline: A Look At Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) is back on many investors’ screens after a strong past 3 months, a contrast with a mixed month and 1 year total return that is prompting fresh questions about its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Seagate Technology Holdings. The recent 42.86% three-month share price return and 40.51% year-to-date share price return, alongside a very large one-year total shareholder return, point to strong momentum, even with some shorter-term pullbacks. headline: Seagate Stock Volatility Sets Up This Strategy To Generate A Return
summary: Seagate Technology stock is showing very high implied volatility with an IV Rank of 80%.  Iron condors can work well when volatility is high as the short strikes can be placed further away from the stock price than normal.  If the price of Seagate stock settles down, it could make for a great iron condor setup.

headline: Memory Is Wall Street’s Favorite Tech Trade as Mag 7 Disappoints
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the stock market’s volatile and uncertain start to the year, one trade has held strong: go long memory and storage.Companies like Sandisk Corp., Western Digital Corp., and Seagate Technology Holdings Plc are among the leaders in the S&P 500 Index in 2026, even with their recent declines, as heavy spending on artificial intelligence creates insatiable demand for memory and storage components used in data centers. summary: Seagate Technology (STX) shows strong earnings growth and a bullish technical setup, signaling a potential breakout for momentum investors.
